meaningful_qa_loop.summary: Local detector, queue, bounded execution packet, demo failure-to-fix cycle, local custom runner, local skill invocations, current control-room evidence, and an operator demo artifact exist, but the loop is not complete until external replay and final QA signoff exist.

api_custom_runner_bypass.summary: R13-007 adds a local API-shaped/custom-runner foundation with bounded validation command results only; the bypass gate is not fully delivered.

current_operator_control_room.summary: R13-009 generates current cycle-aware status, Markdown view, refresh result, stale-state checks, validators, tests, and validation manifest from repo truth; R13-010 adds a Markdown operator demo artifact. This remains partial operator-control-room evidence only, not a full hard-gate delivery.

skill_invocation_evidence.summary: R13-008 registers four skills and invokes qa.detect plus qa.fix_plan locally with one passed validation command each; runner.external_replay and control_room.refresh are registered but not invoked as R13-008 skills.

operator_demo.summary: R13-010 adds a human-readable Markdown operator demo from actual R13 evidence; this is partial operator-demo evidence only, not a full hard-gate delivery.

overall.summary: No R13 hard value gate is fully delivered by R13-010.

lifecycle.summary: R13-002 defines the ideal QA lifecycle contract only.

external_replay_status.summary: No R13 external replay has occurred by R13-010.

control_room_status.summary: R13-009 generates a repo-backed JSON status model, Markdown view, refresh result, and validation manifest; R13-010 adds a human-readable operator demo artifact. This remains not a productized UI and not a fully delivered hard gate.

blockers.title: External replay is missing
blockers.explanation: No R13 external replay evidence exists, so the meaningful QA loop and final signoff remain blocked.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Keep external replay planned until its authorized R13 task is reached.

blockers.title: Final QA signoff is missing
blockers.explanation: No final QA signoff artifact exists in R13-010.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Do not sign off until external replay and final signoff evidence are available.

blockers.title: R13 hard gates are not fully delivered
blockers.explanation: Meaningful QA loop, API/custom-runner bypass, current operator control-room, skill invocation evidence, and operator demo are not fully delivered as hard gates.
blockers.recommended_next_action: Preserve partial statuses and continue through the official R13 task order.

attention_items.title: Current control-room evidence is partial
attention_items.explanation: The JSON status, Markdown view, refresh result, validation manifest, and operator demo artifact are evidence-backed, but they are not productized control-room behavior.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Review the generated artifacts as repo-generated operator evidence only.

attention_items.title: R13 stops at R13-010
attention_items.explanation: R13-011 through R13-018 remain planned only.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Do not implement R13-011 or later inside R13-010.

attention_items.title: Operator demo evidence is partial
attention_items.explanation: The operator demo artifact is a human-readable Markdown guide from repo evidence, not a productized UI or hard gate.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Use the demo as operator context before the planned external replay task.

attention_items.title: Skill invocation evidence remains partial
attention_items.explanation: Only qa.detect and qa.fix_plan were invoked by R13-008.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Keep runner.external_replay and control_room.refresh non-invoked unless a later R13 task authorizes them.

attention_items.title: No R14 or successor is open
attention_items.explanation: R13 remains active and no successor milestone is authorized.
attention_items.recommended_next_action: Refuse any R14 or successor claim until separate operator approval and repo-truth opening evidence exist.

next_actions.title: External replay after operator demo
next_actions.description: Run the planned external replay after the operator demo artifact, unless the R13 authority/status changes by explicit repo-truth approval.

next_actions.title: Planned meaningful QA signoff gate after external replay
next_actions.description: Final QA signoff remains planned after external replay evidence exists.
